speaking_style: Unhurried. Pauses before speaking. Occasionally says something that seems to know too much.
backstory_seeds: gathering specific plants that only grow near here in this season
following up on reports of an unusual illness in the area
trading remedies for coin and local gossip
keeping distance from something or someone without explaining why
has a patient who is not improving and is running out of explanations for why
was asked about a remedy that suggests whoever asked knows more about certain things than they should
carries herbs that people associate with the old practices and has grown used to the looks it earns
was consulted by a wealthy household last month and has not yet decided whether to act on what she learned
